searchDocs.title: Entry​
searchDocs.content: </> interface Entry { Power: number-- Power-of-ten threshold for this suffix. Suffix: string-- Short suffix displayed for numbers at this scale. } One abbreviation entry used by BigNumber formatting.

searchDocs.title: List​
searchDocs.content: </> type List = {Entry} Ordered list of abbreviation entries from smallest to largest scale.

searchDocs.title: RegisterUtils​
searchDocs.content: </> Kitty.RegisterUtils(utilsFolder: Instance ) → () Registers utility modules from a folder into Kitty.Utils. If a utility name matches an existing utility, the custom one replaces it.

searchDocs.title: RegisterPackages​
searchDocs.content: </> Kitty.RegisterPackages(packagesFolder: Instance ) → () Registers package modules from a folder into Kitty root. Each ModuleScript is exposed as Kitty.. If a name matches an existing Kitty member, the custom package replaces it.

searchDocs.content: </> BigNumber:compare(other: any) → number Compares this value to another BigNumber-compatible value.

searchDocs.content: </> BigNumber:sub(other: any) → BigNumber Subtracts another BigNumber-compatible value from this one.

searchDocs.content: </> BigNumber:mul(other: any) → BigNumber Multiplies this value by another BigNumber-compatible value.

searchDocs.content: </> BigNumber:pow(power: number) → BigNumber Raises this value to a numeric power.

searchDocs.content: </> BigNumber:toNumber() → number Converts this value to a Lua number.
